name: USS James C. Owens (DD 776)
events: 10 May 1945 USS James C. Owens (Cdr. Richard Hutchings Blair) departed from San Pedro bound for Pearl Harbor.
16 May 1945 USS James C. Owens (Cdr. R.H. Blair) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
24 May 1945 USS James C. Owens (Cdr. R.H. Blair) departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Okinawa (through Eniwetok and Ulithi).
17 Jun 1945 USS James C. Owens (Cdr. R.H. Blair) arrived off Okinawa.
24 Jun 1945 USS James C. Owens (Cdr. R.H. Blair) departed from the Okinawa area for Leyte.
13 Jul 1945 USS James C. Owens (Cdr. Richard Hutchings Blair) departed from Leyte to operate with the fleet of the Japanese mainland for the remainder of the war.
